description:
You are an industrial hygienist preparing a confined space entry permit. Research flammability properties for Acetone (CAS 67-64-1), Toluene (CAS 108-88-3), Methanol (CAS 67-56-1), Ethylene Oxide (CAS 75-21-8), and Carbon Disulfide (CAS 75-15-0) using the CAMEO Chemicals website (https://cameochemicals.noaa.gov/). 

For each chemical, document the Lower Explosive Limit (LEL) in %, Upper Explosive Limit (UEL) in %, Flash Point, and Autoignition Temperature. Save the assessment report to /home/ga/Documents/flammability_assessment.txt using this format for each chemical:

Chemical: [Name]
CAS: [number]
LEL (%): [value]
UEL (%): [value]
Flash Point: [value with units]
Autoignition Temperature: [value with units]
Flammable Range (%): [UEL minus LEL]

Include an ANALYSIS section at the end of the file identifying the chemical with the widest flammable range and the chemical with the lowest autoignition temperature:

ANALYSIS
========
Widest Flammable Range: [Chemical Name] ([range]%)
Lowest Autoignition Temperature: [Chemical Name] ([temperature with units])
